title: Workspace template in custom app not visible

posts.author: rajivtacstone (Rajiv)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a custom app in order to use a custom workspace template. I have created a sample workspace template as a feature in my app and installed the app to my organizations Monday.com account. However, I cannot find the workspace anywhere. Where does the workspace template appear?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rajivtacstone, welcome to our community!

Yes so your Workspace Templates will show up in the Template Center.

However, you must also make sure that you have defined a “Category” where your template will show up under. This is the section I’m referring to when setting up your Workspace Template:

image1748×360 12.5 KB

You will then be able to find your custom templates.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
